title: QUIC CRT dormant early-data attempt readiness work item
summary: Add a narrow internal readiness observation over the dormant detached resumption carrier while keeping early data explicitly closed and the actual 0-RTT packet family separate.
verification_plan: Run focused requirement-home tests for the REQ-QUIC-CRT-0139 prerequisite regression plus positive readiness, missing-prerequisite negative, the public no-broad-0-RTT guard, and the anti-replay/key-update out-of-scope guard; then run the relevant CRT/API/INT guard set, the full `REQ_QUIC_CRT_` sweep, and SpecTrace render/validation checks.
completion_notes: The managed client/runtime path now surfaces a narrow internal readiness observation when the dormant detached carrier still has both resumption credential material and early-data prerequisite material, but early data remains explicitly closed and actual 0-RTT packet emission remains a separate family.
out_of_scope: opportunistic refactors unrelated to the new early-data attempt-readiness observation
